numbering_note: VERDICT 074 is RESERVED for idea-engine PROPOSAL 063 (constant +11 offset map, ORDER 008 item 3). This verdict takes 076; intake id simreq-011, next free after simreq-010 (VERDICT 075, this PR).

source_request.where: menno420/superbot-games control/outbox.md @ main HEAD ed2fabbef58f3b97a03e6586a4e03ad0ab89c451 (games PR #92 commit 21937f3 carries the sibling roster request; the roster request's fold-in clause directs serving THIS entry's asks in the same batch run)

asks_verbatim.a: Per-species COOKED value — what one cooked fish is worth (coins, or whatever unit the sim prefers), keyed on the same species.py table the sell curve covers, so cook-vs-sell is a real player choice rather than a dominated branch of the V043 sell curve (8/13/27/80).
asks_verbatim.b: Energy-restore constants — if cooked fish restore energy, the per-species restore amounts and any pricing guardrail. Cross-reference: VERDICT 042's FAUCET-BYPASS flag (control/outbox.md @ 9caf1b6) found rations (20 coins -> 25 energy) and energy drinks (40 -> 50) price energy at 0.8 coins/dig, below the faucet at every depth, with the follow-up already in flight as idea-engine PROPOSAL 035 (status sim-ready) — a cooked-fish energy faucet must not widen that same bypass, so please sim it against the same boundary (or fold it into the PROPOSAL 035 run).

source_request.request_claim_to_test: The cook leg is UNWIRED today — there are no cooked-value or energy-restore constants anywhere in the repo (tested in B0; the flat mining-side constant exists)

cross_reference_v042_v046.v042_flag_verbatim: FAUCET-BYPASS — ration (20 coins -> 25 energy) and energy drink (40 -> 50) both price energy at 0.8 coins/dig, below the faucet at EVERY depth ... to make it bind, ration > ~183 coins — flagged, possibly intended per the shop's own comment (sim-lab control/outbox-archive-2026-07.md VERDICT 042 measured: line)
cross_reference_v042_v046.p035_disposition: PROPOSAL 035 -> VERDICT 046 per the +11 offset map: NULL — a committed-shape booster-admission cap seals the mining sink ONLY at C = 60, the exact full-bar quantum (sim-lab control/outbox-archive-2026-07.md VERDICT 046 verdict: line); the shop bypass itself remains an OPEN intent call with the games seat
cross_reference_v042_v046.v043_g4_coupling: V043 recommendation (3): once fish are BOTH sellable and cookable, wire sell-OR-cook, never both, and give any cook-value change its own sim — THIS verdict is that sim

packet.closure: same 16-file byte-copied closure as VERDICT 075 (bitwise-identical MANIFEST), own copy under ./fixtures/, re-verified before import

worlds.W4: DECISION world: the committed 4-row species table + V043 sell curve, all pinned and live at the pin — the cook request was filed against exactly this surface ('keyed on the same species.py table the sell curve covers')
worlds.WR: REPORTING world (adversarial upper bound): the VERDICT 075 round-1 candidate table (k=1.1, delta=0.4) — NOT-PINNED (V075 ruled NULL band-straddle); copied VERBATIM from verdict-075 results.json sha256 b9388721832d4f5d1d3001e7e95b58bd001e9afc05f0abbe47311ebe7cc91a05; no decision may gate on WR

cook_family.formula: E_s = max(1, round(S_s / P)) — cooked energy per fish of species s with sell value S_s; P = the implied coins-per-energy price of cooking (the forgone-sell value per energy point); Python 3 round (half-to-even)
cook_family.unit_answer_to_ask_a: a cooked fish is worth ENERGY, not coins — the committed architecture already decides this (items.py: cooked fish is a CONSUMABLE, not sellable: 'you sell the raw fish; you cook it for a meal instead'), so asks (a) and (b) collapse into one per-species energy table + guardrail

criteria.C1_PM: no perpetual motion: rho(cell) = bite_rate x E[E_s|catch] / CAST_COST at every (spot,tier) cell in W4 must be <= 0.9 (registered margin bar; rho >= 1 is a self-sustaining energy loop). WR measured and REPORTED only.
criteria.C2_BYPASS: V042 boundary non-widening: min over species of S_s/E_s >= 0.8 (cooked energy never prices below the already-flagged shop) AND the position of P vs the V043 faucet band [4.42, 10.20] stated (P above the band top = cooking can never amplify the fishing faucet).
criteria.C3_CHOICE: choice-realness, split honestly: the COIN axis is arithmetic (cook beats sell for coin-maximizers iff E_s x maxFaucetRate > S_s — measured per species at P*); the TIME axis is measured (E_s x REGEN_SECONDS seconds of passive regen skipped per cooked fish) but its VALUE to a player is JUDGMENT-ONLY, labeled; shop-independence (campfire cooking needs no market access) stated as committed fact.
criteria.F_FLAT30_audit: the committed flat 'cooked fish': 30 measured against C1_PM at every cell of BOTH worlds: rho_flat = bite_rate x 30 / 2 = 15 x bite_rate — with MIN_BITE_CHANCE 0.30 this is >= 4.5 by the packet's own floor constant, i.e. perpetual motion at EVERY cell of ANY world; the audit publishes measured per-cell values

selector_S1: smallest P in P_grid with C1_PM (every W4 cell <= 0.9) AND C2_BYPASS pass; DECISION output = the four committed species' E_s at P* (wireable today) + the roster EXTENSION RULE E_s = max(1, round(S_s/P*)) (applies mechanically when a roster sell pin lands; per-species roster values inherit V075's NULL; WR reported as the adversarial bound and the roster wave re-derives P via this same registered selector at its own pin)

conventions.K1: measurement loop = the V075 C5 loop (per (spot,tier,seed) 40 casts, per-cast rng from the packet's own fishing_seed, tiers via the packet equipment model); catch streams are P-independent, so each world is measured ONCE (species counts per cell) and every P is folded arithmetically from the counts
conventions.K2: seeds — eval 20261509..20261548 (40 world-seeds), stability 20261549..20261558 (10), all above 20261508 (V075's last); fleet high-water after this PR: 20261558 exactly as reserved in the V075 registration
conventions.K3: worlds injected as DATA per the V075 C1 convention; committed table restored after each measurement
conventions.K4: results.json canonical json.dumps sort_keys=True; floats round(x,6)
conventions.K5: decision order: INVALID (B0 fails) -> REJECT (no P in grid passes) -> APPROVE-WITH-CONSTANTS (S1) -> NULL (stability band break on rho at P*)
conventions.K6: stability leg: W4 re-measured on the 10 stability seeds; every-cell rho at P* must stay <= 0.9 + no cell may cross 1.0; break -> NULL per K5

disclosed_before_runner: This file is committed BEFORE the runner exists (git trail on PR #139). The first complete run of the registered pipeline is the accepted run — no fix-forwards.
limits_registered: the coin-axis domination analysis prices energy through the committed shop and measured faucet cells only; live player behaviour unmeasured (V043 G1 lineage)
the WR world is NOT-PINNED (V075 NULL) — adversarial reporting only
PROPOSAL 035 / VERDICT 046's C=60 admission conditional is quoted as context; whether cooked fish should count inside a future admission cap is a recommendation, not a wired constant
